description: Austin Adams discusses Bonsol, an off-chain compute framework designed for Solana, highlighting its capabilities and potential applications in the blockchain ecosystem.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Austin introduces Bonsol, an off-chain compute framework that enhances Solana's capabilities by removing compute unit and transaction size limitations. He emphasizes the importance of community involvement in its development and outlines future stages for the project [t=271:85].
